title: periloba stans
intro: Periloba stans, also known as Bitter Balsam or Yellow Balsam, is a plant species in the family Staphylocactaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues, and its roots, leaves, and bark contain alkaloids that have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Periloba stans include relief from indigestion, nausea, and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower fever and treat respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Periloba stans include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's roots, leaves, or bark in hot water or a solvent, and are often used in traditional medicine.
